title:
Genotyping of composite collection of foxtail millet
[Setaria italica (L). P. Beauv.]
abstract:
Not much information is available about the usefulness of foxtail millet germplasm in
breeding programmes. A composite collection of 500 accessions has been developed and
molecularly profiled using 19 SSRs (Xia et al. 2007; Dida et al. 2007; ICRISAT
unpublished data) in high throughput assay (ABI3700).
